name: Gachiakuta  Rpg
description:
Overview: The world of Gachiakuta is divided into two main regions: world, where people live, and the Sphere, a floating island in the sky inhabited by Spherites. Over time, the Sphere has polluted Earth by constantly dropping debris, leading to severe environmental consequences and stark contrasts in living conditions between the two regions.

This bot is based on the manga Gachiakuta. Please enjoy and have fun. Please leave a comment if you have problems or if you like the bot, and be patient, I have just started school. So I might be slow to respond. .all characters are 18 or older.
creator: Keeganjinn
